The company faces significant competition risk from lower-cost manufacturers and well-funded technology rivals. A downturn in consumer demand could materially reduce revenue and operating results. The business depends on a limited number of component suppliers, and supply chain disruptions could increase costs or delay product shipments. Cybersecurity incidents, including data breaches and ransomware, represent a growing risk to operations and reputation. Changes in regulation, trade policy, and tariffs introduce uncertainty into the company's international operations. Foreign-currency volatility and inflation could adversely affect margins. Litigation related to intellectual property and product liability could result in material costs. The company's dependency on third-party platforms and a concentrated set of large customers further increases exposure to market and operational risk.
